column1: # Pinned per base — different bases may run different module versions.
# Build ORDER within a base matters: doca (OFED) before nvidia-open —
# NOTE: production DOCA is a custom MRC build (NOT these public repos, and
# Canonical's doca-ofed repackaging is equally inapplicable). The
# linux.mellanox.com pins below are the PIPELINE TEST stand-in; swap source
# to the MRC artifact location when wiring production builds.
